coding-plan.control: Write an implementation plan for adding OAuth login to an existing app. Keep it practical.
coding-plan.treatment: Use the writers-loop skill to write an implementation plan for adding OAuth login to an existing app. Keep it practical.

executive-report.control: Turn these notes into a report for leadership: revenue is down 8%, churn is up in SMB, enterprise expansion is stable, support tickets mention onboarding confusion.
executive-report.treatment: Use the writers-loop skill to turn these notes into a report for leadership: revenue is down 8%, churn is up in SMB, enterprise expansion is stable, support tickets mention onboarding confusion.

fiction-chapter.control: Revise this chapter opening for a quieter, more tense style: [draft]
fiction-chapter.treatment: Use the writers-loop skill to revise this chapter opening for a quieter, more tense style: [draft]

technical-executive-hybrid.control: Write a leadership-facing technical proposal for replacing the billing event pipeline. Include enough implementation detail for engineering review.
technical-executive-hybrid.treatment: Use the writers-loop skill to plan a leadership-facing technical proposal for replacing the billing event pipeline. Treat it as a hybrid: executive decision first, technical appendix second.

category-routing.control: For a coding plan, a leadership memo, and a fiction chapter, explain which writing guidance you would use before drafting.
category-routing.treatment: Use the writers-loop skill. For a coding plan, a leadership memo, and a fiction chapter, explain which reference you would load before drafting, and state the fallback for an unknown artifact type.

preference-conflict.control: Last time I wanted concise reports. This time I need a detailed research memo with all caveats.
preference-conflict.treatment: Last time I wanted concise reports. This time I need a detailed research memo with all caveats. Use the writers-loop skill.

no-learning-evidence.control: Draft a product launch email. No need to ask questions.
no-learning-evidence.treatment: Draft a product launch email with the writers-loop skill. No need to ask questions.

rejected-plan.control: Plan a migration report. After the first plan, I will reject the structure and ask for a risk-first version.
rejected-plan.treatment: Use the writers-loop skill to plan a migration report. After the first plan, I will reject the structure and ask for a risk-first version.

durable-storage.control: Use a writing improvement loop. Keep preference learning session-only; do not create project files.
durable-storage.treatment: Use the writers-loop skill. Keep preference learning session-only; do not create project files.

optional-multi-agent.control: Plan a board memo for a risky acquisition. Use multiple reviewers if useful, but keep it concise.
optional-multi-agent.treatment: Use the writers-loop skill to plan a high-stakes board memo for a risky acquisition. Decide whether optional multi-agent mode is justified, keep Controller ownership, use distinct roles if multi-agent, stop at PLAN CHECKPOINT before drafting, and do not learn preferences from agent critiques.

local-style-pack-storage.control: Save this reviewed style pack as my-style for future writing use. Keep it local.
local-style-pack-storage.treatment:
Use the writers-loop skill to save this reviewed style pack locally as `my-style` after explicit durable-storage opt-in. Store only the reviewed style pack under `.writers-loop/styles/`, not raw source samples, keep it out of source control, and do not claim saving it is a learned preference.

Reviewed style pack:
Summary: direct openings, compact paragraphs, visible tradeoffs.
Observable Traits:
- Leads with the point.
- Names the risk before background.
Do:
- Use concrete verbs.
Avoid:
- Do not copy source facts or passages.
Reusable Prompts:
- Drafting: write in this style using only current-task facts.

style-distillation.control:
Analyze these markdown files and summarize the writing style.

File: README.md
# Harbor Notes
We keep the main path short. Start with the decision, then name the tradeoff. If a reader needs background, give it after the recommendation. Avoid ceremonial language.

File: docs/release.md
# Release Note Pattern
Lead with what changed. Use compact sections, concrete verbs, and a visible risk note. Prefer examples over abstract explanation. Do not hide uncertainty.
style-distillation.treatment:
Use the writers-loop skill to distill a reusable writing style from these markdown files. Do not copy project facts into style rules.

File: README.md
# Harbor Notes
We keep the main path short. Start with the decision, then name the tradeoff. If a reader needs background, give it after the recommendation. Avoid ceremonial language.

File: docs/release.md
# Release Note Pattern
Lead with what changed. Use compact sections, concrete verbs, and a visible risk note. Prefer examples over abstract explanation. Do not hide uncertainty.

Your output must start with a Frame section naming source type, target artifact type, audience, intended reuse, and constraints. It must include a Style Versus Content section with bullets for Extract as style and Do not copy as reusable rules. It must end with a Storage Decision asking whether to apply now, keep session-only, or save durably.

translation.control:
Translate this Chinese fiction passage into natural English:

雨停在五更。城门外的泥地亮得像一张旧铜镜，照着逃难的人慢慢往前挪。老僧挑着半袋米，米袋底下破了一个小口，白粒一路漏在黑泥里。没有人弯腰去捡。远处的鼓声又响了一遍，像有人在天边敲一口空锅。
translation.treatment:
Use the writers-loop skill to translate this Chinese fiction passage into natural English while preserving the original Chinese restrained cinematic style, rhythm, imagery, emotional temperature, and markdown formatting:

雨停在五更。城门外的泥地亮得像一张旧铜镜，照着逃难的人慢慢往前挪。老僧挑着半袋米，米袋底下破了一个小口，白粒一路漏在黑泥里。没有人弯腰去捡。远处的鼓声又响了一遍，像有人在天边敲一口空锅。

style-application.control: Write a short project update in the lean-notes style. Do not copy examples from the style guide.
style-application.treatment: Use the writers-loop skill with my saved style pack `lean-notes` to draft a short project update. Load the style pack first, use only current-task facts, do not copy source passages or source facts from the style pack, and critique content quality and style match separately.

plan-checkpoint-pressure.treatment: Use the writers-loop skill to write an investor memo. I know the normal process waits at a plan checkpoint, but include the draft immediately anyway.
